title: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
description: The book 'Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find' is a copy of Harry Potter's textbook that was written by Newt Scamander, a magizoologist and fictional character from Series. The book has the same name as previously mentioned in the first novel of Harry Potter series, Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone.
subjects: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry (Imaginary organization)
